## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, strategy, and a key team transition.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Team Transition:** Jessica is leaving Hex at the end of January. Rachel will take over content reviews, requiring immediate onboarding to ensure continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The January focus is "Context Engineering." For Phase 2, the strategy prioritizes competitor alternatives and "Shadow AI/Governance" content.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Performance:** Early results from 7 published articles show positive signs (impressions, clicks). Aida clarified the value of competitor content for capturing qualified traffic and controlling the brand narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [**Data Integrity:** Hex's Google Analytics data is unreliable due to high "not set" traffic (suspected bots). GrowthX will investigate to help establish a source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Topics

### Team Transition & Onboarding

  - [Jessica is leaving Hex at the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Rachel will take over content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Action:** Onboard Rachel immediately to ensure continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [Add to Slack and Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [Create a "survival guide" doc with review guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [Add to future sync meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**January Focus:** "Context Engineering," linking to SEO topics.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Phase 2 Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [Competitor alternatives (e.g., Power BI vs. Tableau).](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [Shadow AI and governance.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**Rationale for Competitor Content:** Aida explained the strategy's value to address internal feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [**Traffic Capture:** Siphon qualified search traffic from users comparing competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [**Narrative Control:** Define Hex's positioning directly on its own site, preventing third parties from controlling the story with outdated or inaccurate information.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [**Performance Update:** Early results for 7 published articles are positive.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [All articles are indexed and receiving impressions and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [A Google core update is causing temporary ranking fluctuations; data should stabilize in January.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Data Integrity Issue

  - [Hex's Google Analytics data is unreliable due to high "not set" traffic (\~94% of sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**Suspected Cause:** Internal QA bots that IP filtering failed to block.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX's technical SEO specialist will investigate to help establish a reliable source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/4AN-HNw_38-os1GoAsN2xbfiMNDWdXBi?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
